Flow.description: Three-tier CE screening for IndividualApplication. Stage 0: NAICS routing (sets agency namespace + confidence modifier). Stage 1: Tier 1 high-confidence sector+type rules. Stage 2: Tier 2 action-type discriminators. Post-match: acreage threshold and GIS extraordinary circumstances checks. Writes nepa_review_type__c, nepa_process_code__c, nepa_screening_confidence__c, nepa_classification_basis__c back to IndividualApplication. Fires after-save on create/update when screening input fields change.
Flow.label: NEPA CE Screener

value.stringValue: | Downgraded to EA: disturbance acres exceeds CE threshold.

assignments.name: Assign_Tier2AcreageDowngrade
assignments.label: Tier 2: Downgrade to EA — Acreage Exceeded
assignments.description: Tier 2: Downgrade to EA — Acreage Exceeded

value.stringValue: | Downgraded to EA: disturbance acres exceeds CE threshold.
No CE screening rule matched sector/type/action-type combination. Defaulting to EA. SME review required.
| OVERRIDDEN to EA: extraordinary circumstances flagged ({!$Record.nepa_extraordinary_circumstances__c}). CE disqualified per CEQ regulations.
| Confidence downgraded to Low: NAICS code indicates high-risk industry (extraction/production). SME review required.
| Screened: {!$Flow.CurrentDateTime} | Review Type: {!var_ReviewType} | CE Code: {!var_CECode} | Confidence: {!var_Confidence}

decisions.name: Decision_HasRelatedProject
decisions.label: Has Related Project?
decisions.defaultConnectorLabel: No Project — skip to GIS check

decisions.name: Decision_Tier1Found
decisions.label: Tier 1 Rule Matched?
decisions.description: Tier 1 Rule Matched? If agency-specific query returned nothing, try ALL-agency rules before proceeding to Tier 2.

decisions.name: Decision_AlreadyTriedALL_T1
decisions.label: Tier 1: Agency Is Already ALL?
decisions.description: Prevents a second ALL lookup when the lead agency IS ALL (would duplicate Get_Tier1Rule).

rules.name: T1_Agency_Is_ALL
rules.label: Agency Is ALL — skip duplicate lookup

rules.name: Tier1_NeedsAcreage
rules.label: Needs Acreage Check and Acres Provided
rules.description: Needs Acreage Check and Acres Provided

decisions.name: Decision_Tier1RequiresGIS
decisions.label: Tier 1: Requires GIS Check?
decisions.defaultConnectorLabel: No GIS Check — apply NAICS modifier then write

decisions.name: Decision_Tier2Found
decisions.label: Tier 2 Rule Matched?
decisions.description: Tier 2 Rule Matched? If agency-specific query returned nothing, try ALL-agency rules before defaulting to EA.

decisions.name: Decision_AlreadyTriedALL_T2
decisions.label: Tier 2: Agency Is Already ALL?
decisions.description: Prevents a second ALL lookup when the lead agency IS ALL.

rules.name: T2_Agency_Is_ALL
rules.label: Agency Is ALL — skip duplicate lookup

rules.name: Tier2_NeedsAcreage
rules.label: Needs Acreage Check and Acres Provided
rules.description: Needs Acreage Check and Acres Provided

rules.name: NAICS_Modifier_IsLow
rules.label: NAICS Modifier = Low and Current Confidence Is Not Low
rules.description: NAICS Modifier = Low and Current Confidence Is Not Low

recordLookups.name: Get_NAICSRule
recordLookups.label: Get NAICS Routing Rule
recordLookups.filterLogic: 1 AND 2 AND 3 AND (4 OR 5) AND (6 OR 7)

recordLookups.name: Get_Tier1Rule
recordLookups.label: Get Tier 1 Screening Rule (Agency-specific)
recordLookups.filterLogic: 1 AND 2 AND 3 AND 4 AND (5 OR 6) AND (7 OR 8)

recordLookups.name: Get_Tier1Rule_ALL
recordLookups.label: Get Tier 1 Screening Rule (ALL agencies)
recordLookups.filterLogic: 1 AND 2 AND 3 AND 4 AND (5 OR 6) AND (7 OR 8)

recordLookups.name: Get_Tier2Rule
recordLookups.label: Get Tier 2 Screening Rule (Agency-specific)
recordLookups.filterLogic: 1 AND 2 AND 3 AND 4 AND (5 OR 6) AND (7 OR 8)

recordLookups.name: Get_Tier2Rule_ALL
recordLookups.label: Get Tier 2 Screening Rule (ALL agencies)
recordLookups.filterLogic: 1 AND 2 AND 3 AND 4 AND (5 OR 6) AND (7 OR 8)

recordUpdates.name: Update_ScreeningFields
recordUpdates.label: Update CE Screening Fields
recordUpdates.description: Writes AI recommendation to nepa_ce_pathway_recommendation__c. Does NOT set nepa_review_type__c — coordinator confirmation required per Salesforce AI AUP.

variables.name: inp_EvaluationDate
variables.description: Date against which CMT temporal validity is evaluated. Set to nepa_start_date__c of the IndividualApplication by NEPA_CE_Screening_IP. When null, only the Active__c filter applies (backward compatible). Used in filterLogic OR branches: Effective_Start_Date__c IS NULL OR <= date; Sunset_Date__c IS NULL OR >= date.

variables.name: var_AgencyAbbr
variables.description: Lead agency abbreviation used to match CE screening rules.

variables.name: var_SectorKey
variables.description: Project sector key from the related Program record.

variables.name: var_TypeKey
variables.description: Project type key from the related Program record.

variables.name: var_ReviewType
variables.description: Screening result review type (CE/EA/EIS) being assembled.

variables.name: var_CECode
variables.description: CE authority code selected by the matching screening rule.

variables.name: var_ClassificationBasis
variables.description: Audit trail string explaining the classification decision.

variables.name: var_ScreenerRunTimestamp
variables.description: Timestamp captured just before the write-back update. Written to nepa_screener_last_run__c so NEPA_Litigation_Risk_Scorer can detect that nepa_review_type__c was changed by this flow rather than by a human, and skip its re-fire.

variables.name: var_ErrorMessage
variables.description: Captures $Flow.FaultMessage from a faulted element for error logging.

variables.name: var_CurrentStep
variables.description: Tracks the last-reached major step. Passed to NEPA_Error_Logger as inp_FailedStep on fault.

variables.name: rec_RelatedProject
variables.description: Related Program record fetched to obtain agency, sector, type, and NAICS.

variables.name: rec_NAICSRule
variables.description: NAICS-tier NEPA_CE_Screening_Rule__mdt record providing namespace/confidence modifier.
